screenshot_privacy_status: Legacy screenshots remain redacted as before. New 0.6.15 screenshots were captured from mocked local/demo API responses and visually reviewed; they intentionally use demo admin/profile labels, demo pairing code, documentation URL/IP-style examples, and contain no real tokens, emails, webhook URLs, account secrets, or personal paths.
packaging_note: Top-level docs package; excluded from npm package files and desktop webui extraResources by current packaging configuration.
